preconditions: Navigate to the exact URL http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the application loads home_page in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting each independent test branch.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and enabled after navigation from home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Verify the Username field is visible and editable.
Verify the Password field is visible and editable.
Verify the Login button is visible and enabled.
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled.
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled.
testCases.expectedResult: The Login page displays interactive Username, Password, Login, Back, and Home controls after navigation from home_page.

testCases.title: Verify password field masks characters during manual entry
steps: Navigate from home_page to the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click inside the Password field.
Type Carwash#1 into the Password field and observe the displayed characters during entry.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks entered characters during input and does not display the plaintext password value on screen.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication using approved credentials returns the user to authenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home and verify guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user, returns to home_page in authenticated state, and authenticated user identity display and authenticated-only functionality become visible.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username with valid password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify valid username with invalid password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter WrongPassword#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the application does not transition to authenticated state, and no separate required-field validation message appears.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and invalid password combination does not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter InvalidPassword in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is visible, and the user remains unauthenticated without returning to authenticated home_page.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field blank.
Leave the Password field blank.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the application remains in unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username with populated Password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Leave the Username field blank.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, and the application does not transition into authenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify populated Username with blank Password displays only the generic Failed message
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Leave the Password field blank.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, and the user remains unauthenticated without dedicated required-field validation messaging.

testCases.title: Verify leading whitespace in Username credential submission follows implemented application behavior
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter a leading-space modified username value such as ' krisadmin' in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button and observe the resulting authentication behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The application behavior for leading whitespace in credentials is observationally validated, and if authentication fails the generic Failed message is the only authentication error shown while the application remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify trailing whitespace in Password credential submission follows implemented application behavior
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter a trailing-space modified password value such as 'Carwash#1 ' in the Password field.
Click the Login button and observe the resulting authentication behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The application behavior for trailing whitespace in credentials is observationally validated, and any authentication failure displays only the generic Failed message while maintaining unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only credential submission does not authenticate the user
steps: Navigate to home_page in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Enter only whitespace characters in the Username field.
Enter only whitespace characters in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The user is not authenticated, the application remains in unauthenticated state, and only the generic Failed message is displayed if validation feedback appears.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user from Login page to unauthenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click the Back button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state without logging in the user.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user from Login page to unauthenticated home_page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Open the Login page using the person/profile button.
Click the Home button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns the user to home_page in unauthenticated guest state and no authenticated user functionality is displayed.
